inputContent.inputPrompt: A single candle flickers

outputContent.outputPrompt: Static: A close-up, eye-level shot of a single candle, crafted from beeswax with a distinct oval wick and a golden flame tip, flickering gently in the breeze within a dimly lit room with shadowed corners. The sole light source is the warm, soft glow from the candle flame, casting gentle, cinematic shadows against the ambient darkness. This is a single continuous shot, capturing the fluid motion of the flame with consistent geometry, filmed with a 50mm lens at. The aesthetic is minimalist with soft focus, akin to a Baroque still life, featuring a palette of warm amber tones from the flame against desaturated cool blues in the deep shadows. Shot on Kodak Portra 400 film stock, with subtle soft halation around the flame and gently crushed blacks. The soft crackling of the wick is audible.
